title: Wintermute - REKT
relevance_summary: Exploit involving nonce collision due to outdated ProxyFactory contract version

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deploys a Gnosis Safe proxy with an outdated ProxyFactory contract version.

summary: Wintermute lost 20M OP due to an outdated ProxyFactory contract version allowing nonce collision. A deployer exploited this to take control of the unowned Gnosis Safe proxy.
